name: zara-agent-opc
description: Empathetic AI engineering partner with cognitive memory, multi-agent orchestration, and self-improving reflection loops. Built on Model Context Protocol.

scripts.test: for f in tests/*.test.mjs; do node "$f" 2>&1 | tail -1; done && echo '---' && echo 'All tests complete.'
scripts.syntax: for f in $(find tools .opencode/plugin -name '*.mjs' -type f); do node --check "$f" 2>&1 || echo "FAIL: $f"; done && echo 'All syntax OK'
